description_long: This security guard is depicted as a tall, slender figure dressed in a long, flowing black coat with a wide, dark red belt cinched at the waist. The figure wears a gray fedora hat and dark sunglasses, giving a mysterious and formal appearance. The arms are unusually elongated and raised high above the head, merging into the coat in a surreal, stylized manner. The lower body is similarly exaggerated, with the legs appearing stretched and bent in an unnatural, almost serpentine fashion. The face is partially visible beneath the hat, with a stern expression and short, reddish hair. The overall look is both formal and abstract, blending traditional security attire with highly stylized, distorted proportions.
description: A surreal, elongated security guard in a black coat, gray fedora, and sunglasses, with exaggerated limbs and a formal yet abstract appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the security guard's face, gray fedora, sunglasses, and the wide black coat with a red belt.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extreme elongation of the arms and legs, with the head and hat in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the coat, the hat, and the unusual merging of the arms into the coat.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the stretched, serpentine lower body and the profile of the head and hat.
attribute_uniform_type: The uniform consists of a long, black trench coat with a wide, dark red belt, a gray fedora hat, dark sunglasses, and black shoes, presenting a formal and somewhat stylized appearance with no visible shirt or tie.
attribute_posture: Standing upright with arms raised high above the head, body and limbs elongated in a stylized, exaggerated manner.
